goals.title: Execute .omo/plans/shift-space-no-resize-appshot-work.md: make LazyCo...
goals.objective: Execute .omo/plans/shift-space-no-resize-appshot-work.md: make LazyCopy AppShot default to Shift+Space, remove Windows paste restore/resize behavior, verify with RED/GREEN tests and CLI/no-restore evidence. Scope excludes dd behavior changes, AppShot skill commands, and performance rewrites.

successCriteria.scenario: Auxiliary CLI surface: node bin/lazycopy.js appshot hotkey install --app Codex --dry-run --json returns ok:true and generated command contains shift+space, not control+space by default.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Final B reverify: default AppShot hotkey dry-run emits shift+space, explicit control+space custom key still works, and scripts/windows-hotkey.ps1 direct helper default is shift+space. Artifacts: task-2-surface.txt, task-2-custom-key-surface.txt, task-2-windows-hotkey-scan.txt.

successCriteria.scenario: Invariant/failure surface: scripts/windows-paste-into-app.ps1 contains no ShowWindowAsync(..., 9), SW_RESTORE, MoveWindow, SetWindowPos, Maximize, Minimize, or Resize operations in the paste path.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Final B reverify: Windows paste path has no restore or resize tokens and cleanup receipt shows no QA processes or temp roots left. Artifacts: task-2-no-restore-scan.txt, task-2-cleanup.txt.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression surface: npm test passes and dd behavior tests remain green after AppShot shortcut/paste changes.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Final B reverify: npm test passed 20/20, git diff --check passed, scope/doc-trigger/dd guard checks passed. Artifacts: task-2-npm-test.txt, task-2-diff-check.txt, task-2-scope.txt.

goals.evidence: Final quality gate passed: code review CLEAR, manual QA passed, gate review APPROVE, npm test 20/20, default Shift+Space dry-run, explicit control+space dry-run, Windows helper Shift+Space default, no restore/resize scan, scoped diff and cleanup receipts.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019f18e8-ac7a-7d51-918e-2950b4bf9a60/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019f18e8-ac7a-7d51-918e-2950b4bf9a60/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: Final quality gate passed: code review CLEAR, manual QA passed, gate review APPROVE, npm test 20/20, default Shift+Space dry-run, explicit control+space dry-run, Windows helper Shift+Space default, no restore/resize scan, scoped diff and cleanup receipts.
